creator: thyes@gmx.net
text:
Installation aborts with:

Panic: ffs_valloc dupalloc

Minimal install succeed, but the system crashed after the system has
rebooted as soon as some disk i/o happens.

At this time debian is installed, here some information about the hardware.

How-To-Repeat: 
Each installation fails.
